subject: Phandalin
fact: The party arrived in Phandalin.
source_quote: The party arrived in Phandalin

subject: Stonehill Tavern
fact: The party gathered information at the Stonehill Tavern.
source_quote: gathered information at the Stonehill Tavern

subject: Red Brands
fact: The party learned about the Red Brands gang.
source_quote: learned about the Red Brands gang

subject: Glasstaff
fact: Glasstaff is the leader of the Red Brands gang operating from Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: their leader Glasstaff operating from Tresendar Manor

subject: Tresendar Manor
fact: Glasstaff operates from Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: operating from Tresendar Manor

subject: blackstone fragments
fact: The party received a warning about blackstone fragments tied to a powerful obelisk.
source_quote: received a warning about blackstone fragments tied to a powerful obelisk

subject: Goblin Trail
fact: The party traveled the Goblin Trail.
source_quote: The party traveled the Goblin Trail

subject: trap encounter
fact: The party survived a hidden pit and a snare.
source_quote: survived traps (a hidden pit and a snare)

subject: goblin lookout defeat
fact: The party defeated goblin lookouts at the cave entrance.
source_quote: defeated goblin lookouts at the cave entrance

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon scouted ahead and encountered a massive coiled snake before retreating.
source_quote: Zenvon scouted ahead, encountering a massive coiled snake before retreating

subject: Cragmaw Cave
fact: The adventure is set to continue into Cragmaw Cave.
source_quote: continuing into Cragmaw Cave

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra has darkvision of 60 feet.
source_quote: Veyra and Sister Maela have darkvision (60 feet)

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela has darkvision of 60 feet.
source_quote: Veyra and Sister Maela have darkvision (60 feet)

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon cannot see in the dark.
source_quote: Zenvon and Pip cannot see in the dark

subject: Pip
fact: Pip cannot see in the dark.
source_quote: Zenvon and Pip cannot see in the dark

subject: party pairing decision
fact: Nikhil Reddy decided to pair Zenvon with Veyra and Maela with Pip.
source_quote: Decided to pair Zenvon with Veyra and Maela with Pip

subject: pairing revision
fact: The party agreed to pair the fighter Pip with the magic user Veyra and Zenvon with the cleric Sister Maela.
source_quote: Agreed to the revised pairing

subject: group stealth check
fact: Zenvon rolled a 15 and Sister Maela rolled a 9 on the group stealth check.
source_quote: Zenvon rolled 15, Sister Maela rolled 9

subject: wolves
fact: The wolves had a perception of 13.
source_quote: wolves had a perception of 13

subject: stealth success
fact: The party passed the wolves undetected.
source_quote: the party passed undetected

subject: wolf bypass decision
fact: Nikhil Reddy decided to bypass the three wolves and proceed toward the snake.
source_quote: Decided to bypass the three wolves and proceed toward the snake

subject: snake stealth check
fact: Zenvon rolled a 25 on the stealth check to slip past the snake.
source_quote: Zenvon rolled 25

subject: snake attack decision
fact: The party chose to attack the snake with surprise.
source_quote: chose to attack it with surprise

subject: giant poisonous snake
fact: The party initiated combat against the giant poisonous snake.
source_quote: initiated combat against the giant poisonous snake

subject: combat initiative
fact: Nikhil Reddy rolled initiative of 21 and went first.
source_quote: Rolled initiative of 21, going first

subject: Nikhil Reddy first attack
fact: Nikhil Reddy fired a shortbow but missed with a roll of 10.
source_quote: fired a shortbow but missed (rolled 10)

subject: Veyra Firebolt
fact: Veyra cast Firebolt and hit the snake for 10 points of damage.
source_quote: Veyra cast Firebolt and hit for 10 points of damage

subject: Pip javelin throw
fact: Pip threw a javelin but missed due to disadvantage in darkness.
source_quote: Pip threw a javelin but missed due to disadvantage in darkness

subject: Sister Maela Sacred Flame
fact: Sister Maela attempted Sacred Flame but the snake made its saving throw.
source_quote: Sister Maela attempted Sacred Flame but the snake made its saving throw

subject: Nikhil Reddy second attack
fact: Nikhil Reddy used the shortbow with disadvantage, rolling a 12 which was a hit.
source_quote: the 12 was still a hit

subject: snake death
fact: The second arrow killed the snake.
source_quote: killed the snake

subject: stealth roll failure
fact: Sister Maela's stealth roll of 3 alerted a group of goblins.
source_quote: Sister Maela's poor stealth roll (3) alerted a group of goblins

subject: goblins
fact: Three goblins were spotted initially.
source_quote: Three goblins were spotted

subject: goblins
fact: One goblin noticed Sister Maela.
source_quote: one noticed Sister Maela

subject: Zenvon initiative
fact: Zenvon rolled initiative of 7.
source_quote: Zenvon rolled initiative of 7

subject: deception attempt
fact: Nikhil Reddy attempted a deception check claiming the party came to meet Glasstaff, but it failed.
source_quote: the deception failed

subject: goblins
fact: A fourth goblin shouted in Goblin.
source_quote: A fourth goblin shouted in Goblin

subject: Sildar Hallwinter
fact: Sildar Hallwinter's voice was heard in the distance.
source_quote: Sildar Hallwinter's voice was heard in the distance

subject: short rest
fact: The party took a short rest before continuing.
source_quote: The party took a short rest before continuing

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon recovered to 9 hit points after the short rest.
source_quote: Zenvon recovered to 9 hit points

subject: Pip damage
fact: Pip took significant damage from repeated goblin attacks totaling 6, 3, and 5 points.
source_quote: Pip, who took significant damage (6 + 3 + 5 points at various stages)

subject: Pip healing
fact: Sister Maela used Cure Wounds to heal Pip for 6 hit points.
source_quote: Sister Maela used Cure Wounds to heal Pip for 6 hit points

subject: Veyra Magic Missile
fact: Veyra used Magic Missile to kill one goblin.
source_quote: Veyra used Magic Missile, killing one goblin

subject: goblin damage
fact: Veyra's Magic Missile reduced another goblin to 2 hit points.
source_quote: reducing another to 2 hit points

subject: Yimek
fact: Yimek is a goblin boss.
source_quote: Goblin Boss Yimek

subject: Pip critical hit
fact: Pip scored a critical hit on Yimek for 8 points of damage.
source_quote: Pip scored a critical hit (natural 20) on Yimek for 8 points of damage

subject: light source activation
fact: Nikhil Reddy turned on a light source using his action.
source_quote: Turned on a light source (using his action)

subject: darkness disadvantage removal
fact: Turning on the light source removed the darkness disadvantage for subsequent turns.
source_quote: removing the darkness disadvantage for subsequent turns
